thesis_profile.market_mechanism: alpha extraction in cross-sectional crypto requires a universe matched to the regime: the top-20 liquid perp core systematically underperforms in broad-up regimes (e.g. 2025 H2 trend_up) because retail-driven flows favor mid-cap names; switching to a tier-2 mid-cap universe (perp ranks 20-40) should expose the cross-sectional alpha that the v9-style leader plus carry-dislocation blend can capture in regimes where top-20 names structurally underperform
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank tier-2 (perp rank 20-40) liquid mid-cap names higher using the v67 four-quadrant regime-adaptive blend of leader-continuation and carry-dislocation with strictly-gated contrarian tilt; the change versus the locked v64 baseline is purely the universe scope, isolating the contribution of universe redefinition to per-regime performance
thesis_profile.factor_formula: compute the v67 dual-regime-filter blend (leader-continuation, carry-dislocation, gated contrarian) over a tier-2 mid-cap perp universe (ranks 20-40 by median perp quote volume) instead of the top-20 core; weight allocation follows the four-quadrant per-timestamp scheme with leader 0.85 in dispersed-up, carry 0.75 in dispersed-down, leader-def 0.55 in broad-up, leader-carry-contrarian 0.20-0.40-0.40 in broad-down
